step_rationale: Gasotransmitter signaling in STEMI; carvedilol-response pathway.
mechanism: Hydrogen-sulfide gasotransmitter signalling, enhanced by β-blockade, protects against myocardial ischaemia-reperfusion injury in acute coronary syndromes.

references.title: Metabolomics of repetitive myocardial stunning in chronic multivessel coronary artery stenosis: Effect of non-selective and selective β1-receptor blockers.
A Comparative Metabolomics Approach Reveals Early Biomarkers for Metabolic Response to Acute Myocardial Infarction.
